name: hermes-tweet
description: Hermes Agent X/Twitter workflows for read-first research, monitoring, audits, and explicit approval-gated account actions.

interface.shortDescription: Hermes Agent workflows for X/Twitter research and gated actions
interface.longDescription: Install and operate the Hermes Tweet plugin for source-aware X/Twitter research, monitoring, audits, support triage, and explicitly approved account actions. The workflow starts with read-only tools and keeps account actions behind a dedicated enablement gate.
defaultPrompt: Use Hermes Tweet for read-only X/Twitter research.
Prepare a Hermes Tweet monitor for this release keyword.
Check the Hermes Tweet action gate before any account action.
